message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 7 committed, CI green — verify and approve">
Step 7 (Clarify as Project) is complete at commit 29108c4, CI green.

Most of you have already reviewed and approved. Steve Krug — please verify your blocking item (validation error dead-end page) is resolved in this commit.

If anyone wants to re-review the final version, key files are:
- src/services/inbox_service.rs — clarify_as_project()
- src/routes/inbox.rs — unified clarify handler
- templates/inbox_item.html — radio buttons with fieldset/legend
- static/css/main.css — :has() progressive disclosure

Please send consensus approvals to carson-gross.
</teammate-message>

content.text: My approval was already sent multiple times, but let me send it directly to Carson as the coordinator requested.

input.content:
**CONSENSUS APPROVED** from Marty Cagan for Step 7 (Clarify as Project).

No blocking issues. The implementation correctly fulfills US-GTD-2 for the clarify-as-project path. All product requirements addressed: inline radio group, separate trash button, CSS :has() progressive disclosure, required first action title (422 on empty), shared context select, unified form endpoint, glossary updated. 8 integration tests provide solid coverage. The pattern scales well for future clarify destinations (Steps 9, 11).
input.summary: Step 7 CONSENSUS APPROVED from Marty Cagan

content.text: Standing by for the consensus tally, mini-retro, and next steps. My Step 7 approval has been sent to Carson as requested.
